name: Alex Chen
title: Director of Product Design
summary: I lead design teams building complex, high-stakes software — enterprise tools, developer platforms, and AI-powered products. I work across the full arc from strategy to shipped component: building design systems, coaching teams, and closing the gap between research and production. I care about craft and operational rigor in equal measure.

bullets: Lead a team of 11 designers across 3 product lines serving 4,000+ enterprise customers.
Rebuilt the design system from scratch — 240-component library adopted by 8 engineering squads, reducing design-to-dev handoff time by 40%.
Launched an AI-assisted search and summarization feature that became the product's highest-rated capability in NPS surveys within one quarter of release.
Established a DesignOps function: onboarding playbook, critique cadence, and contribution model that cut new-designer ramp time from 10 weeks to 4.
Partnered with CPO and CTO to define a 3-year platform consolidation roadmap, reducing the product surface from 7 apps to 2.
Owned end-to-end design for a data pipeline builder used by 600+ data engineering teams — the company's core monetized product.
Shipped a zero-to-one dashboard builder that replaced a legacy reporting tool; adoption reached 70% of active accounts within 6 months.
Led a 5-person design sprint that surfaced 3 critical workflow blockers, directly informing a $2M product investment decision.
Built the team's first component library in Figma with auto-layout and variable support; cut design production time by half.
Conducted 80+ user interviews across engineering, operations, and executive personas to anchor product direction in behavioral evidence.
Designed responsive interfaces for financial services clients including two top-10 U.S. banks.
Established the agency's accessibility review process, bringing 4 client products into WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
Facilitated discovery workshops with VP and C-suite stakeholders to define product scope and success criteria.
Mentored 3 junior designers; two were promoted within 18 months.

writing_rules: Active voice. Vary sentence length. Concrete examples over abstractions.
No closing flourish or restatement sentences.
